Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We must refer to standard sequence Create Purchase Requisition Approve Purchase Requisition Issue Purchase Order Receive Goods Vendor Invoice Received Match Invoice to PO Release Payment Close Case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1001 follows a more standard sequence create approve issue PO then receive goods vendor invoice received match invoice to PO release payment close case

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: In Case 1002 the approval should occur before issuing purchase order But in case 1002 Approve Purchase Requisition comes after Issue Purchase Order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Also the order of events are weird In case 1002 vendor invoice and release payment happen before goods received and match invoice to PO That might be problematic because usually you must receive goods first then verify invoice against purchase order Payment should not be released until after matching the invoice to purchase order or even after receiving the goods

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1003 is unusual Payment has been released before vendor invoice and before Receive Goods

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: That is problematic because it may indicate that payment was made without verifying the goods receipt or matching invoice to purchase order which can lead to financial fraud or errors

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: For case 1004 we see that Receive Goods happens before Issue Purchase Order This is highly anomalous

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: If goods are received prior to purchase order issuance it means goods may have been delivered without a formal order or control measure in place which could lead to confusion unauthorized procurement possible fraud risk or errors in invoicing

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So summary anomalies Case 1002 Approval happens after issuing PO and vendor invoice is received and payment released before goods receipt Case 1003 Payment release occurs before receiving goods and before invoice receipt Case 1004 Receive Goods is performed prior to issuing Purchase Order
